disclaimer: This is entertainment. Not science. Not therapy. Not a legally binding reason to email your boss “sorry, I’m a Goblin.”
celebsNote: ‘Famous vibe matches’ are playful comparisons, not claims about anyone’s real personality.

VHKRSM.title: The Sir Shieldington
VHKRSM.headline: Field dossier: **The Sir Shieldington** (VHKRSM). Classification: **Viking Hero**. Operating mode: *clipboard-friendly, mission-first, dojo-minded, calm-core*.
strengths: Moves fast when action is required
Feels responsible for the group’s wellbeing
Good at creating clarity and standards
Excellent at building structure that actually gets used
pitfalls: Can become the unofficial therapist / fixer
May hesitate to take bold chances
Can become the ‘process police’ when stressed
VHKRSM.oneLiner: If something needs doing *and* someone needs help, you’re already moving.

Natural reformer: breaks bad systems and replaces them with better ones
pitfalls: May get stuck in ‘one more draft’ mode
Can treat constraints like personal attacks
Can be too intense or controlling
Can bulldoze rules *and* feelings to get results
WGPRSM.oneLiner: You solve problems sideways, with style and a tiny bit of mischief.
